messages.sql:
SELECT r.name, SUM(s.total_amount) AS total_sales
FROM public.sales s

GROUP BY r.region_id, r.name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC

messages.sql:
SELECT
    r.name,
    COALESCE(s.total_sales, 0) - COALESCE(e.total_expenses, 0) AS profit
FROM
    public.regions r
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT region_id, SUM(total_amount) AS total_sales
        FROM public.sales
        GROUP BY region_id
    ) s ON r.region_id = s.region_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT region_id, SUM(amount) AS total_expenses
        FROM public.expenses
        GROUP BY region_id
    ) e ON r.region_id = e.region_id
